title: Sum of Diagonal Elements in 3x3 Matrix

content.problemStatement:
Write a program to input values for a 3×3 matrix from the user. Calculate the sum of the elements on the main diagonal (where the row and column indices are equal) and print the sum.

---
**Steps to complete:**
1. Declare a 3×3 matrix.
2. Use nested loops to take input for all elements of the matrix.
3. Iterate through the matrix to find elements where row index equals column index.
4. Calculate the sum of these diagonal elements.
5. Print the sum in the format: "Sum of diagonal elements: ".

----

sampleTestCases.output:
Enter 9 elements:
Sum of diagonal elements: 20

Enter 9 elements:
Sum of diagonal elements: 21
